what_it_does: This file is an interpretive ledger entry that summarises and structures a nine-level analysis of a 30-page capital-raise pitch deck, recording observations, standouts, conventions, concerns, questions, themes, inferred intent, novelty, and contribution, and routing findings to token/diagram/atom registries.
observations: Describes a 9-level analysis ladder applied to one pitch-deck folder: surface, grid, zoning, type, colour, icons, atoms, archetypes, narrative
States that content is translated into generic, content-agnostic roles per an unnamed GUIDE
Catalogues atoms in a table with explicit 'In system?' status markers
Uses a 4-symbol diff vocabulary against the design system: confirm / new / generalise / contradict
Records a 'running-sentence titles' rule where slide titles chain into one grammatical sentence
Cites specific page numbers and exact hex values as evidence
Includes an 'Open items / to verify next' section with one item marked RESOLVED inline
Reports the conclusion 'No contradictions' after analysing the dense 30-page deck
standouts: Running-sentence titles framed as the strongest narrative rule surfaced by the corpus
Graduation discipline for sage-green: promoted to an L0 primitive only after three independent semantic uses plus a definitional legend on p5
Explicit refusal to graduate photographic green into a UI voice, treating the distinction as blocking
Theme.light described as a clean↔warm sub-axis (#ffffff to #fdfcf7) rather than a redraw
conventions: Evidence-grounded claims tied to page numbers and exact hex/measurement values
Re-confirmation discipline that notes when a property holds across multiple folders
Token-driven framing that routes findings to specific registry files
Registry-as-truth: atoms are checked against a system registry and new ones marked for growth
Axis thinking: surface, density, and LOD treated as orthogonal axes
Single-source / no-redraw framing: variations expressed as sub-positions on a knob
concerns: Some findings are single-folder-deep yet still routed toward graduation
The 'No contradictions' conclusion is self-reported without visible adversarial check
Open items reference external documents and a 'slice 28' whose state cannot be confirmed from this file alone
notes: A dense, evidence-structured interpretive summary of one pitch-deck analysis that both re-confirms an existing design grammar and proposes new rules for registry graduation.
questions: Where does the GUIDE that defines content-agnostic role translation live?
What is 'slice 28' and the FINDINGS-LOG that resolved the sage-green open item?
Are the five new diagram sub-types already present in DIAGRAMS.md/DiagramSolver, or only proposed here?
How is the multi-folder graduation bar reconciled with single-folder-deep findings such as running-sentence titles?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the header states it is a folder analysis that re-confirms the model and surfaces new grammar, and the body delivers that across nine levels plus a system diff.
intention_signals: The author appears to be reverse-engineering a corpus of pitch decks into a formal, queryable design grammar, extracting reusable atoms, diagrams, and colour roles into a single-sourced token/registry system, and only graduating findings to system primitives when evidence is definitional or multi-instance.
novelty: The running-sentence-titles rule, the explicit definitional-vs-multi-instance graduation bar for colour primitives, and the treatment of photographic-vs-UI colour as a blocker for graduation are unusual.
contribution: Contributes a leveled grammar-extraction method, the running-sentence-title narrative rule, a content-agnostic atom/archetype catalogue with system-status tags, the clean↔warm theme sub-axis, the sage-green communication semantic with its graduation rationale, and five proposed diagram sub-types routed to specific registries.
summary_for_embedding: An interpretive ledger JSON that summarises a nine-level structural analysis of a 30-page capital-raise pitch deck, cataloguing format, grid, colour roles, atoms, archetypes, narrative, and a design-system diff feeding token/diagram/atom registries.
intention_for_embedding: To record a pitch-deck analysis as a formal single-sourced design grammar, surfacing new rules and graduating them to system primitives only on strong evidence.
